title: Integration test secretx-doppler against real Doppler
description:
Run the live integration tests for the doppler backend against a real Doppler account. Tests exist but have never been run against a live service.

**Why:** The doppler backend is published but unverified against a real service. The secret.computed response field path and error handling are untested.

**Setup required:**
1. Create a free account at doppler.com
2. Create a project + config + one secret (e.g. DB_PASSWORD)
3. Generate a service token

**Run with:**
SECRETX_DOPPLER_TEST=1 DOPPLER_TOKEN=dp.st.xxx DOPPLER_PROJECT=myproject DOPPLER_CONFIG=prd DOPPLER_SECRET_NAME=DB_PASSWORD cargo test -p secretx-doppler

**Acceptance:** All integration tests pass. Update beads memory and the integration test status table in README.md.
